# vrWorldFlags

**Data field**

A set of flags for the VR world.

## Overview

This field is unused.

## Data fields

- **majorVersion**: The major version number of the file format.
- **minorVersion**: The minor version number of the file format.
- **nameAtomID**: The ID of the string atom that contains the name of the scene.
- **defaultNodeID**: The ID of the default node.
- **reserved1**: Reserved.
- **reserved2**: Reserved.
